# Category: cloud_network_security

params: {}

variables: {instances_per_zone : "1", zone        : "us-central1" }  # set the values here if needed, e.g., for more zones use us-east4 as example and so forth...  
instance_template: |         {"name":"ssh","region":"%{zone}", "tags":{"foo":"bar"},    {"startupScripts":[],           {uuid : 123 }}"},                   # Add here if you want to run any startup script (e.g., installing packages), e.g.:  
                      """ name: rdp            region: %{zone}             tags         foo     uuid       """,    {"startupScripts":[],"automatic_scaling"}}  }},                  # For Autoscaling, add here if required ... }}], "allowed" : ["0.0.0.0/0"]}]
